title: Amazon Linux 2023 - ALAS2023-2026-1882: Important priority package update for kernel
description:
Package updates are available for Amazon Linux 2023 that fix the following vulnerabilities:
CVE-2026-53128:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

drbd: Balance RCU calls in drbd_adm_dump_devices()

CVE-2026-53111:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

bpf: test_run: Fix the null pointer dereference issue in bpf_lwt_xmit_push_encap

CVE-2026-53096:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

bpf: Use RCU-safe iteration in dev_map_redirect_multi() SKB path

CVE-2026-53075:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

ppp: require CAP_NET_ADMIN in target netns for unattached ioctls

CVE-2026-53074:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

bpf: reject short IPv4/IPv6 inputs in bpf_prog_test_run_skb

CVE-2026-53069:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

net, bpf: fix null-ptr-deref in xdp_master_redirect() for down master

CVE-2026-53063:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

dm cache: fix write hang in passthrough mode

CVE-2026-53061:
	In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

dm cache: fix dirty mapping checking in passthrough mode switching
